$schema_note: Template + schema for a personality bundle. Copy this file to personalities/<slug>.json and fill it in. See ../docs/PERSONALITIES.md for the step-by-step.
name: TODO: Human-readable name shown in the app switcher
_slug_note: Unique, kebab-case. MUST match the folder name in assets/sounds/<slug>/.
claude_system_prompt: TODO: Write the character. Define tone, vocabulary, and quirks. CRITICAL: demand SHORT output — one or two punchy sentences. The backend also enforces a low max_tokens.
deepgram_voice: TODO: Deepgram TTS voice id that fits the character
_voice_note: Pick a Deepgram voice; this is the literal sound of the narration.

sound_cues._note: Map each cue name (see assets/sounds/manifest.json) to a file in this personality's sound folder. Only the ACTIVE personality's cues fire. Missing cues simply won't play.

mode_hints._note: Optional. Per-mode tweaks to behavior (e.g. narrate less often in a quiet mode). Final mode list is a build-time decision — see docs/PERSONALITIES.md.
